chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 236 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shamsuddin N.Kobhar, ADvoate for Respondents No.5 to 7 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Ms. Shabana Naheed, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG as well as Counsel appearing for private respondents 5 to 7 submit that the official respondents as well as the private respondents shall act in accordance with the law. On such statement of the learned AAG and Counsel for the private respondents 5 to 7, learned counsel for the Petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant Petition. Accordingly, the instant Petition is disposed of; however the official respondents as well as the private respondents 5 to 7 to act strictly in accordance with the law and official respondents shall also provide protection to the petitioner. Judge ARBROHI/PS
